docs.title: Home
docs.text: A collection of 3D printed mounts and hangers for garage tools designed to mount to a horizontal 1x4 or 2x4 board.

docs.title: Start here
docs.text:
• Browse model organization: STL Library
  • View repository: GitHub Repo

docs.title: Project goals
docs.text:
• Keep tool storage modular and easy to reconfigure
  • Share printable files and revision notes
